name: RABBIT-SPEC-BUG-8
title: SKILL.md Step 1 narrows Invariant 4 (read any feature file) by example without clarifying scope
description: SKILL.md Step 1 instructs reading only scripts/ and skills/ subdirectories as implementation examples. Invariant 4 says rabbit-spec MAY read ANY file in the target feature directory. SKILL.md's wording implies a restricted scope without saying 'examples include'. A future caller might interpret this as a hard constraint. Fix: add 'for example,' or 'including but not limited to' to align wording with the invariant.
